HGSS.527.0000:
This is a problem!\f
The machine at the Power Plant
is broken, and we’re not receiving\r
electricity!\f
I don’t know how long it will be until
we can get the Magnet Train going.
HGSS.527.0001:
Thanks to someone who got the
Power Plant up and running,\r
the Magnet Train is available again!\f
Passengers need to go through the
gate for the automatic ticket check...\f
HGSS.527.0002:
...Beep!\f
I am so sorry, but you need
a Magnet Train Pass to get on\r
the Magnet Train...\f
HGSS.527.0003:
Passengers need to go through the
gate for the automatic ticket check...\f
HGSS.527.0004:
Ping...fwip!
Here is your Pass back.\f
This train is about to leave
for Goldenrod City.
HGSS.527.0005:
Enjoy the attractive and magnetic
journey!
HGSS.527.0006:
We have arrived at Saffron! Saffron!
The accent is on the “a”!
HGSS.527.0007:
Enjoy the attractive and magnetic
journey!\f
HGSS.527.0008:
The Magnet Train is a super-modern
rail liner that uses electricity and\r
magnets to attain incredible speeds.\f
However, there isn’t any electricity.
It’s just an iron box.
HGSS.527.0009:
Whew...\f
How many times have I gone back
and forth between Kanto and Johto?
HGSS.527.0010:
Before the Magnet Train station was
built, there was a house here.\f
A little girl who was called Copycat
used to live in it.
HGSS.527.0011:
Hi. Do you have a Magnet Train Pass?\f
I have one.\f
All the people in Saffron who ride the
Magnet Train have Passes.
HGSS.527.0012:
Lt. Surge: Oh! I never expected to see
you at a place like this!\r
What a coincidence!\f
I can feel great electric power around
the Magnet Train station!\f
You had a PIKACHU, didn’t you?
How about trading it for my\r
French PIKACHU? [0200,0000]
HGSS.527.0013:
Lt. Surge: My PIKACHU and
your PIKACHU up for a trade,\r
what do you think?
HGSS.527.0014:
Lt. Surge: Wow! Electrifying!
Let’s trade ’em now!\f
HGSS.527.0015:
Lt. Surge: Shocking!
I want to share my feelings for\r
PIKACHU with you!\f
I’m ready anytime, so just bring
a PIKACHU, OK?
HGSS.527.0016:
Lt. Surge: Yeah!
I’m so ecstatic! I’ll see you around.\r
Good-bye!\f
HGSS.527.0017:
Lt. Surge: What? That is not
the right Pokémon!\f
I won’t trade my PIKACHU for
anything other than PIKACHU.
HGSS.527.0018:
We request that you make sure your
Pokémon are well behaved or put away\r
in their Poké Balls so they won’t lick\r
other passengers’ faces.\r
Thank you.
